note: Explorer DTD lottery winners chart now shows top 20 instead of top 10. The bar chart's row count is doubled (winners.slice(0,20)) and the canvas height bumped from 180px to 340px so each row keeps the same ~17px vertical real estate it had before — at 180px with 20 rows the labels would overlap. Title updated to 'LOTTERY WINNERS · SOST WON (top 20)' so the cap is explicit. The PHASE 2 SHAPE BREAKDOWN and TOP MINERS cards are untouched and stay at 180px; the new layout has the lottery card visually taller, matching the increased data density. NO consensus, NO RPC schema, NO node, NO miner, NO transaction wire format. Pure presentation tweak.
